texto: Sometimes, when I look at my work at the newspaper and squint in just the right way, I can even see it as a microcosm of democracy itself. After all, every staff member participates in the creation of each issue. I solicit their ideas. I value the contributions of women and minorities. Of course, I wasn't democratically elected, but what newspaper chief ever was?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Jennifer Steil que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “Sometimes, when I look at my work at the newspaper and squint in just the right way, I can even s…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre trabalho, deomcracy, journalism, com foco em trabalho e journalism.

texto: How does one develop compassion for someone with a completely different set of values without reading something from their point of view? Books are one of the ways in which we can truly get into the heads of people we would never meet in our ordinary lives and travel to countries we would otherwise never visit.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Jennifer Steil que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “How does one develop compassion for someone with a completely different set of values without rea…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre sabedoria, compassion, empathy, com foco em viagem e empathy.
